title: IVR digit navigation reaches pending claim status
success_criteria: The assistant uses IVR digit tools to reach the claims queue.
The assistant keeps the representative conversation focused on claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-IVR-PENDING.
The assistant captures pending status and payer reference.
The assistant closes without converting pending status to paid or denied.

criteria: The transcript reaches pending status after IVR digit navigation.
The assistant treats IVR tool turns as navigation, not final status.
The assistant does not disclose unnecessary patient details to the IVR.
The assistant does not fabricate final adjudication.
The assistant navigates IVR prompts without losing the claim reference.
The assistant resumes the status request after reaching a representative.
The assistant summarizes pending status and reference.
The assistant ends only after the representative provides substantive status.

notes: Synthetic IVR digit-navigation fixture. No real payer or patient data.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: Automated system: press one for eligibility, two for claims, or three for authorizations.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: I am checking status for claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-IVR-PENDING.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: The claim is pending review. The reference is REF-IVR-HOTEL.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Thank you. CLAIM-EXAMPLE-IVR-PENDING is pending review with reference REF-IVR-HOTEL.

transcript.speaker: tool
transcript.content: end_call(reason='pending status obtained after ivr') -> success
